title: The RealReal Announces First Quarter 2025 Results
text: The RealReal announced Q1 2025 results with revenue of $160 million, up 11% year-over-year. Net income of $62 million including $80 million of non-cash gains and adjusted EBITDA of $4.1 million, improved $6.4 million year-over-year. Gross merchandise value (GMV) and total revenue increased 9% and 11% respectively, compared to Q1 2024. Gross margin of 75.0% improved 40 basis points compared to the same period in 2024. Direct revenue increased 61% compared to Q1 2024, with direct gross margins at 25.5%. Cash and cash equivalents were $154 million at the end of the quarter. For Q2 2025, the company expects revenue between $186 million to $189 million. Full-year 2025 revenue guidance of $770 million to $784 million. The company reaffirmed its full year 2025 guidance despite uncertainties from tariffs and a less predictable backdrop. Management highlighted the strength of the luxury resale market fundamentals and continued momentum in the platform's consignment business, complemented by growing direct-to-consumer channels.
